# netbox_virtual_machine_primary_ip (Resource)

Manages the primary IPv4/IPv6 addresses of a Virtual Machine in Netbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "netbox_virtual_machine_primary_ip" "example" {
  virtual_machine_id = netbox_virtual_machine.example.id
  primary_ipv4_id    = netbox_ip_address.example_v4.id
  primary_ipv6_id    = netbox_ip_address.example_v6.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `virtual_machine_id` (Number) The ID of the virtual machine to configure.

### Optional

- `primary_ipv4_id` (Number) The ID of the IP address to set as the primary IPv4 address.
- `primary_ipv6_id` (Number) The ID of the IP address to set as the primary IPv6 address.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the virtual machine (same as virtual_machine_id).
